prompt: A lone human silhouette at the center of an infinite dark void, connected by thin silver threads to four dimly glowing figures in the middle distance. Each of those four figures radiates dozens of bright golden threads to masses of luminous, densely clustered figures at the far edges of the frame. The central figure is the dimmest point in the image. The outer clusters are intensely bright, almost overwhelming. Surreal, painterly, deep blacks, high contrast, no text, no numbers, no labels, no charts.
visual_logic: A dim central node connected to few figures; each of those figures connects to vast bright clusters at the periphery, making the center structurally and visually the least-connected point despite being the origin.
